title: File System Operations
description: Build reactive file read and write components using Node.js APIs.
read_intro: The <0>Read</0> component loads a file and passes its content as an accessor to a render callback. Children receive the content reactively.
write_intro: The <0>Write</0> component watches a content accessor with <1>createEffect</1>. When the content changes, it writes to disk. The <2>untrack</2> guard prevents re-writing the same content.
usage_intro: Compose <0>Read</0> and <1>Write</1> to build pipelines that transform file content reactively:
